title: Daoist Canon: Wenchang Dijun Yinzhi Wen (Section 2)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Wenchang Dijun Yinzhi Wen
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Wenchang Dijun Yinzhi Wen

translation.text: From the Wenchang Dijun Yinzhi Wen of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
